settings.business.name: Ceremoney
settings.business.description: Ceremoney is the all-in-one wedding planning platform. Create your beautiful wedding website, manage your guest list, plan seating, coordinate vendors, and make your special day unforgettable.
settings.business.display.name: true

serviceCategories.name: Planning & Coordination
serviceCategories.description: Full-service wedding planning and day-of coordination

serviceCategories.name: Venue & Catering
serviceCategories.description: Venue selection, catering management and menu planning

serviceCategories.name: Decor & Styling
serviceCategories.description: Floral arrangements, decor, and styling services

services.name: Basic
services.shortDesc: Your beautiful wedding website with RSVP management, guest list, and essential planning tools. Everything you need to get started — free forever.
services.metaTitle: Basic Wedding Plan — Free Wedding Website & RSVP | Ceremoney
services.metaDescription: Create your stunning wedding website, collect RSVPs, and manage your guest list with Ceremoney's free Basic plan.
services.description:
The Basic plan gives you everything you need to launch your wedding presence online and start collecting RSVPs. Completely free — no credit card required.

What's Included

  • Custom Wedding Website — elegant templates, custom colors and content
  • RSVP Management — guests RSVP directly through your site
  • Guest List — manage up to 50 guests with full contact details
  • Planning Checklist — built-in timeline with reminders
  • Vendor Directory — browse vetted local vendors

packages.name: Basic
packages.description: Essential tools to start your wedding journey

faqs.question: Is the Basic plan really free?
faqs.answer: Yes! Completely free with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All your data carries over when you upgrade.

services.name: Premium
services.shortDesc: Unlimited guests, seating chart designer, custom domain, PDF & XLS export — everything for a perfectly organised wedding.
services.metaTitle: Premium Wedding Plan — Guest Management & Seating Chart | Ceremoney
services.metaDescription: Manage unlimited guests, design seating charts, use your own domain, and export PDFs with Ceremoney Premium — 299 SEK/month.
services.description:
The Premium plan is our most popular, designed for couples who want complete control over every aspect of their wedding organisation.

What's Included

  • Unlimited Guest List — no limits on guests
  • Seating Chart Designer — drag-and-drop table and seat assignment
  • Custom Domain — connect your own domain (e.g. emma-and-oliver.com)
  • PDF & XLS Export — export guest list and seating chart
  • Advanced RSVP — track meals, dietary needs, transport, song requests
  • Everything in Basic

faqs.question: How does the seating chart work?
faqs.answer: Drag-and-drop designer — create tables, assign guests, export as PDF.

faqs.question: Can I use my own domain?
faqs.answer: Yes, connect any domain you own to your Ceremoney wedding website.

services.name: Elite
services.shortDesc: Stationery designer, QR code entrance scanning, team collaborators, SMS messaging — the ultimate wedding planning experience.
services.metaTitle: Elite Wedding Plan — Stationery, QR Entry & Collaborators | Ceremoney
services.metaDescription: Design stationery, scan QR codes at the door, invite collaborators, and send SMS with Ceremoney Elite — 499 SEK/month.
services.description:
The Elite plan is the most comprehensive offering, built for couples who want a truly premium end-to-end experience.

What's Included

  • Stationery Engine — design and send digital invitations and save-the-dates
  • QR Entrance Scanning — scan guests at the door for instant check-in
  • Team Collaborators — invite your planner or family to help manage
  • SMS Credits — send reminders and day-of updates to guests
  • Everything in Premium

packages.name: Elite
packages.description: The ultimate wedding planning suite — 499 SEK/mo

faqs.question: How does QR entrance scanning work?
faqs.answer: Each guest gets a unique QR code. Scan at the venue entrance to check in instantly.

faqs.question: How many collaborators can I invite?
faqs.answer: Multiple collaborators — your planner, maid of honor, or family members.

services.name: Venue Coordination
services.shortDesc: Professional venue sourcing and coordination. We shortlist venues, negotiate contracts, and manage logistics.
services.metaDescription: Find and coordinate your perfect wedding venue with Ceremoney's venue coordination service.
services.description:
Our Venue Coordination service takes the stress out of finding the perfect venue.

  • Venue Shortlist — curated to match your style and budget
  • Site Visits — we arrange and accompany you
  • Contract Negotiation — fair terms, protected interests
  • Logistics Planning — parking, accessibility, vendor access

faqs.question: How many venues will you shortlist?
faqs.answer: Up to 5 in the basic package, unlimited in the full package.

services.name: Wedding Photography
services.shortDesc: Professional photography and videography coordination. We match you with the right photographer and manage all deliverables.
services.metaDescription: Find your perfect wedding photographer with Ceremoney. Vetted professionals, contract management, stunning memories.
services.description:
Our Photography Coordination matches you with the ideal photographer for your style and manages every detail.

  • Photographer Matching — vetted professionals aligned to your vision
  • Contract Management — fair terms and clear deliverables
  • Timeline Coordination — every key moment captured
  • Album Coordination — post-wedding album design and delivery

faqs.question: Do you provide the photographer directly?
faqs.answer: We coordinate and match you with vetted independent photographers.

services.name: Floral & Decor
services.shortDesc: Beautiful floral arrangements, centerpieces, ceremony arch, and complete venue styling.
services.metaDescription: Coordinate stunning floral arrangements and venue decor for your wedding with Ceremoney.
services.description:
Transform your venue into the wedding of your dreams with our Floral & Decor coordination.

  • Style Consultation — mood board and detailed vision
  • Florist Matching — aligned to your aesthetic and budget
  • Decor Planning — arch, aisle, centerpieces, sweetheart table
  • Setup Coordination — delivery and setup managed perfectly

faqs.question: Can I bring my own floral inspiration?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Share Pinterest boards or photos and we'll match your vision.

services.name: Catering Management
services.shortDesc: Menu planning, caterer coordination, dietary management, and tasting sessions for every guest.
services.metaDescription: Coordinate perfect wedding catering with Ceremoney. Menu planning, caterer matching, dietary management.
services.description:
Our Catering Management service handles everything from finding the perfect caterer to managing every dietary requirement.

  • Caterer Matching — preferred cuisine, guest count, budget
  • Menu Planning — curated to your taste and dietary needs
  • Tasting Sessions — coordinated and joined by our team
  • Dietary Management — pulled directly from Ceremoney RSVP data

faqs.question: How do you handle dietary requirements?
faqs.answer: We pull dietary data directly from your Ceremoney RSVP responses.

services.name: Day-of Coordination
services.shortDesc: A dedicated coordinator manages your wedding day so you and your family can be fully present and enjoy every moment.
services.metaDescription: Enjoy your wedding day stress-free with Ceremoney's dedicated day-of coordination service.
services.description:
You've planned everything — now enjoy it. Our Day-of Coordination puts a dedicated coordinator on-site to manage vendors, timeline, and any surprises.

  • Pre-Wedding Meeting — detailed briefing 2 weeks before
  • Vendor Liaison — all vendors confirmed and coordinated
  • On-Site Management — from setup to the last dance
  • Guest Management — welcoming, seating, and guiding guests
  • Emergency Kit — stain remover, sewing kit, and everything unexpected

faqs.question: What hours does the coordinator work?
faqs.answer: Typically 2 hours before ceremony through the first hour of reception.

faqs.question: Do I need this if I have a venue coordinator?
faqs.answer: Venue coordinators manage only the venue. Our coordinator works entirely for you — all vendors, your timeline, your vision.

faqs.question: Is Ceremoney free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes! Ceremoney's Basic plan is completely free — no credit card required. It includes your wedding website, RSVP collection, guest list (up to 50 guests), and planning checklist. Upgrade to Premium or Elite for advanced features.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Premium and Elite?
faqs.answer: Premium (299 SEK/mo) includes unlimited guests, seating chart designer, custom domain, and PDF/XLS export. Elite (499 SEK/mo) adds the stationery designer, QR code entrance scanning, team collaborators, and SMS credits.

faqs.question: Can I create a password-protected wedding website?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can add a password to your wedding website so only invited guests can access it. This keeps your RSVP form and personal details private.

faqs.question: How does RSVP collection work?
faqs.answer: Guests visit your wedding website and fill in the RSVP form — including their name, attendance status, dietary requirements, and plus-one details. All responses appear instantly in your Ceremoney guest list.

faqs.question: Can I manage the bride's and groom's guest lists separately?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every guest in Ceremoney is tagged to either the bride's side or the groom's side. You can filter, view, and export each side separately.

faqs.question: How does the seating chart work?
faqs.answer: The seating chart is a drag-and-drop visual designer. Create tables of any shape and size, then drag guest names from your list to assign seats. Export the finished chart as a PDF.

faqs.question: What is QR entrance scanning?
faqs.answer: With Elite, each guest automatically receives a unique QR code. At your venue entrance, scan the code with any smartphone to check them in. See real-time attendance as guests arrive.

faqs.question: Can my wedding planner access my account?
faqs.answer: With Elite, you can invite collaborators — your wedding planner, maid of honor, or family — who get access to manage guests, RSVPs, and planning tasks.

testimonials.name: Emma & Oliver Lindqvist
testimonials.content: Ceremoney made planning our wedding so much easier. The seating chart feature saved us hours, and guests loved how elegant our wedding website looked. We got RSVPs from everyone within the first week!

testimonials.name: Sofia & Ahmed Karlsson
testimonials.content: We used Ceremoney Elite and the QR code entrance scanning was absolutely brilliant. Our venue coordinator was amazed — check-in took seconds for each guest. Worth every öre.

testimonials.name: Maja & Felix Bergström
testimonials.content: As someone who is not tech-savvy at all, I was worried about building a wedding website. Ceremoney was incredibly easy to use. Our website was live in under an hour and looked absolutely beautiful.

testimonials.name: Alicia & Tom Johansson
testimonials.content: The stationery designer in Elite is stunning. We designed our digital invitations to perfectly match our wedding theme and colors. Guests loved receiving them. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Hannah & David Eriksson
testimonials.content: Managing dietary requirements for 120 guests seemed overwhelming. Ceremoney's RSVP system collected everything automatically and we could export a clean list for our caterer. Game changer!

testimonials.name: Isabelle & Marcus Nilsson
testimonials.content: Our wedding planner used the collaborator feature to manage the guest list with us in real time. Having everything in one place — RSVPs, seating, vendors — was invaluable.

legalPages.title: Privacy Policy
legalPages.content:
Privacy Policy

At Ceremoney, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in accordance with GDPR.

Data We Collect

We collect information you provide directly: account registration details, wedding project data, and guest information submitted through RSVP forms. Guest data is collected only with explicit GDPR consent.

How We Use Your Data

Your data is used solely to provide and improve Ceremoney's services. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time. Contact us at privacy@ceremoney.com.

Data Retention

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, all personal data is permanently removed within 30 days.

legalPages.title: Terms of Service
legalPages.content:
Terms of Service

By using Ceremoney, you agree to these Terms of Service.

Use of Service

Ceremoney provides wedding planning tools for personal use by couples planning their wedding.

Account Responsibility

You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activity under it.

Guest Data

You are responsible for ensuring that guest data collected through Ceremoney RSVP forms complies with applicable privacy laws, including obtaining GDPR consent.

Subscription

Premium and Elite plans are billed monthly. No refunds for partial months. Cancel anytime.

legalPages.title: GDPR & Data Protection
legalPages.content:
GDPR & Data Protection

Ceremoney is fully compliant with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

Guest RSVP Data

When guests submit an RSVP through a Ceremoney wedding website, they provide explicit consent for their data to be stored for event management purposes. This consent is recorded with a timestamp.

Your Rights Under GDPR

  • Right to access your personal data
  • Right to rectification
  • Right to erasure
  • Right to data portability

Contact: privacy@ceremoney.com
